messages.busyDay: you have a full day ahead and a few things are ready to be wrapped up.
messages.budgetCritical: the budget is already tight, so it is worth staying disciplined on costs.
messages.budgetHigh: it is a good time to watch expenses, because the budget is entering a sensitive zone.
messages.finalStretch: the finish line is getting closer and the end of the build is finally in sight.
messages.midBuild: you are in a solid rhythm now and the build is clearly moving forward.
messages.earlyBuild: the groundwork for the next stages is in place and momentum is building.
messages.focusDay: you have a clear plan for today, so it is worth making this day count.
messages.steadyDay: this is a good moment to calmly prepare the ground for the next stages.
messages.oneStep: one good step today really makes a difference.
messages.smallWin: even a small bit of progress brings you closer to your home.
messages.clearPlan: when the plan is simple, the build feels much calmer.
messages.steadyDirection: you are moving in the right direction and it shows.
messages.calmControl: a tidy app makes the build feel less stressful.
messages.dreamCloser: the home you imagine is already much closer than it seems.
messages.goodHands: this is in good hands, so you can keep going calmly.
messages.lessStress: good order in the build means less stress day to day.
messages.enjoyIt: it is worth enjoying the fact that this home is really taking shape.
messages.buildingHappens: this is the moment when a plan starts becoming a real home.
messages.smallStep: small steps today are the best way to get a big result tomorrow.
messages.proudMoment: this is a good moment to feel proud of what is already happening.
messages.calmProgress: steady progress often leads to the best final result.
messages.homeSoon: your own home is much closer than it may have looked at the start.
messages.orderMatters: good structure now means less chaos later.

photos.empty: Add your first site photo to start building a visual progress history.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.clickDayHint: Tap a day to see tasks
calendar.noTasks: Add your first task to make the next jobs easier to plan.
calendar.noTasksForDay: There are no tasks scheduled for this day yet.

weather.emptyText: Add the site location to see conditions on the build.
weather.emptyFallback: Complete the location and check the forecast before work starts.

allRain.0: The next few days may slow outdoor work.
allRain.2: Outdoor jobs are better moved to a drier window.

rainTodayTomorrow.0: The next few days are wet, so protect materials and exposed parts.
rainTodayTomorrow.1: Conditions favor indoor or covered work.
rainTodayTomorrow.2: Focus today on things that do not like rain.

rainToday.0: Today may be rough for outdoor work.
rainToday.2: It is better to keep outdoor tasks protected today.

rainTomorrow.0: Today is a good outdoor window, with rain possible tomorrow.
rainTomorrow.1: Wrap up outside jobs while you can.

rainAfterTomorrow.0: Today and tomorrow are good for outdoor work.
rainAfterTomorrow.1: Rain may arrive in 2 days, so protect materials.
rainAfterTomorrow.2: Good time to move ahead before the weather turns.

windy.0: Be careful with high work and light materials.
windy.1: Check foil, membranes, and loose parts.
windy.2: Stronger wind can make outside mounting harder.

cold.1: Check conditions for wet work and building chemicals.
cold.2: Low temperatures may call for a more careful plan.

hot.0: Bring water, breaks, and shade for materials.
hot.1: Avoid overheating materials and working in direct sun.
hot.2: Shorter work blocks are better in the heat.

noRain.0: Good outdoor conditions for the next few days.
noRain.1: The coming days look favorable for outside work.
noRain.2: Good weather for deliveries, cleanup, and work around the site.

fallback.0: Check conditions before planning outdoor work.
fallback.1: The forecast may need a manual look before deciding.
fallback.2: It is worth checking the latest data before heading out.

modal.hint: Choose a date and optionally a time. If no time is set, the task is all-day.

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.empty: Your first build updates will appear here.

todayTasks.title: Today's tasks
todayTasks.emptySummary: You do not have any tasks planned for today yet.
todayTasks.emptyTitle: There is room in today's plan
todayTasks.emptyText: Add a task for today or check what is coming up next.
